title: eryngium juresianum
intro: Eryngium juresianum, also known as the alpine sea holly, is a flowering plant species in the family Apiaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to its alkaloids and sesquiterpene lactones. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and providing antioxidant protection. Eryngium juresianum is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, but its use should be guided by a healthcare professional due to potential interactions and side effects.
